TerraSwarm Annual Meeting: October 26 & 27, 2016 (Source: Housing at Berkeley ) The TerraSwarm Annual Meeting was held on October 26 & 27, 2016 in Berkeley. Registration and additional details available here. Overview The purpose of this annu

available here. Overview The purpose of this annual meeting was to review our progress thus far and to plan for the coming year. Attendance to the Annual Meeting was strictly limited to our review team, corporate sponsors, academic

our review team, corporate sponsors, academic partners, and the SRC. Any other attendees were approved before the meeting by the SRC. Location of the Meeting and Parking The meeting was held at the Clark Kerr Campus, 2601 Warring St Berkeley

t the Clark Kerr Campus, 2601 Warring St Berkeley, CA 94720. Program Photos ( High resolution photos are available ) Questions? Concerns? Contact Libby Coyne (office: 510.664.7030) or Christopher Brooks (707.332.0670) Website Copyright ©
